message:
bd-16j5r: deterministic collision resolution for NameRegistry

Add three explicit collision modes for name registration:
- Fail: reject with NameTaken (existing behavior, now also via policy)
- Replace: displace old holder, create new lease, return displaced info
- Wait: enqueue budgeted waiter (FIFO, deadline-bounded)

Infrastructure: NameCollisionPolicy enum, NameCollisionOutcome enum,
WaiterEntry queue, GrantedLease drain, unregister_and_grant(),
try_grant_to_first_waiter(), drain_expired_waiters().

Cleanup methods (cleanup_region, cleanup_task) now also remove waiters.
Three new RegistryEvent variants: NameReplaced, WaiterEnqueued, WaiterGranted.
New NameLeaseError::WaitBudgetExceeded variant.

15 new tests (53 total registry tests), all quality gates green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
